notes: Runtime evidence for HAR-226 local order payment staging plus HAR-278 validation guardrails. The covered happy paths and validation branches intentionally use synthetic/local order transactions rather than live gateway-affecting captures, voids, or mandate payments; permission-specific and Plus-only live branches remain documented as future conformance expansion. The referenced integration test verifies over-capture, invalid void, void-after-capture, and missing mandate idempotency branches leave downstream order state and mutation logs unchanged until the generic parity runner can replay the multi-operation local payment staging flow directly.
